en.extract:
The churring cisticola (Cisticola njombe) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae.
It is found in Malawi, Tanzania, and Zambia.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical high-elevation grassland.

The '''churring cisticola''' ('''''Cisticola njombe''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Cisticolidae]].
It is found in [[Malawi]], [[Tanzania]], and [[Zambia]].
Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical high-elevation [[grassland]].
